title: Course Profile
description: Curriculum identity for one course. One file per course taught. Referenced by class profiles.

course_id.description: Short identifier matched by class profiles and generate-package --course.

grade.description: Grade level. String allowed for multi-grade or non-standard (e.g. 'K-12').

theme.description: Engine theme — controls generation vocabulary and tone defaults.

grade_band_contract.description: Filename stem of the grade-band contract in engine/generation/contracts/. Omit for non-standard courses.

curriculum_anchor.description: For non-standard courses, the closest standard curriculum this maps to (e.g. 'wm10' for a designated workplace readiness class).

default_output_types.description: Output types always included when generating a package for this course. Overridden per class.

tiered_by_default.description: If true, generate-package fans out worksheets into scaffolded/core/extension variants by default.

notes.description: Anything about this course worth flagging for generation — structure, assessment style, special constraints.
